title: MasterClass Pepper or Salt Grinder, Plastic, Copper Effect, 17 cm, Silver Gray
features: SEASON IN STYLE with this MasterClass pepper or salt grinder, featuring a glowing copper effect finish
IDEAL FOR COOKING AND SERVING, the mill is refillable, so you can ensure you've always got your seasonings on hand
COPPER EFFECT: it's made of robust plastic, with a warm copper effect finish, and comes with interchangeable 'S' and 'P' caps
STRONG GRINDING MECHANISM: the rust-resistant ceramic mechanism makes light work of the toughest peppercorns and sea salt crystals
A GREAT GIFT: this 17 cm (6½") grinder makes a thoughtful Christmas or housewarming gift. Includes MasterClass's 5 year guarantee
description: From the manufacturer Cook with Confidence Experiment, create and accomplish: with outstanding design, premium quality and a passion for food, MasterClass helps you cook with confidence. MasterClass Large Copper-Effect Salt or Pepper Mill (17 cm) Useful Information: Includes 1 x mill only Size: 5.5 x 17 cm (2 x 6½ inches) Comes with 1 x ‘S’ cap and 1 x ‘P’ cap Wipes clean Seasoning food is an essential part of both the cooking and serving process, so why not add a dash of luxury, too? This large salt or pepper grinder, from MasterClass, lets you grind peppercorns and rock salt with precision, speed and style. The grinder is made of robust plastic with a warm, glowing finish that mimics the look of copper. As a finishing touch, it features a metal band that's laser-etched with the MasterClass logo, giving it a glimmer that's sure to look fantastic on kitchen worktops and dining tables alike. This refillable mill can be topped with interchangeable metal ‘S’ or ‘P’ knobs, so you’ll always know which seasoning is inside. The grinding mechanism, meanwhile, is made of tough, rust-resistant ceramic. It will make easy work of grinding your chosen seasoning, ensuring a quick and even grind. Need Something a Little Smaller? The MasterClass copper-look salt and pepper grinder is also available in a smaller 12 cm (4½ inch) size – ideal for quick cooking and mid-week mealtimes. Salt and Pepper Mills, by MasterClass MasterClass has the tools to cater for your mealtimes, whatever your style. Explore the full range of MasterClass salt and pepper mills and choose from walnut, beech, brass, copper and marble-effect grinders to find the finish that will complement your décor, as well as your dishes. At MasterClass, We Love Food Food is passion. Food is special. Food is everyday. Trust MasterClass to elevate your culinary experience - whether you're feeding a family, entertaining to impress, or striving to become the best home chef you can be. Established in 1850, MasterClass provides an extensive range of expert kitchen tools and gadgets, cookware and its acclaimed bakeware collection. Every product is designed with one simple goal in mind: to make great food accessible to anyone who cooks or wants to cook.
